brand.fontFamily: -apple-system, system-ui, Segoe UI, Noto Sans, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji

workflow.name: How can I schedule an agent to run every day and also configure it to receive a name in metadata?
workflow.description: Schedule an agent to run daily and configure metadata with a name in Browser Use Cloud.

steps.title: Access Dashboard
steps.description: Click the BU Max button to access the main dashboard.

steps.title: Open Scheduled Jobs
steps.description: Click on Scheduled Jobs in the sidebar to manage and create scheduled agent runs.

steps.title: Schedule Agent
steps.description: Click the Schedule Agent button to start configuring a new scheduled agent.

steps.title: Enter Agent Name
steps.description: In the Name field, enter a name for your scheduled agent.

steps.title: Select Schedule Frequency
steps.description: Click the schedule dropdown to select how often the agent should run.

steps.title: Select Daily Schedule
steps.description: Select 'Every day at midnight (UTC)' from the list to set a daily schedule.

steps.title: Expand Advanced Options
steps.description: Click on Advanced Options to reveal additional settings like metadata.

steps.title: Enter Metadata
steps.description: In the Metadata (JSON) field, enter the desired metadata in JSON format.

steps.title: Enter Task Description
steps.description: Enter a description of the task you want the agent to perform.

steps.title: Create Scheduled Job
steps.description: Click the 'Create Scheduled Job' button to save and finalize your scheduled agent setup.
